message:
feat(engine): feature parity tracker — validation, failure tracking, and waiver-aware status

Major enhancement to the feature parity tracker for more rigorous
validation and precise failure attribution.

Input validation:
- Test262Result: verify failing_test_ids count matches total-passing;
  reject duplicate failing test IDs
- LockstepResult: reject duplicate mismatch test IDs
- Both checks prevent phantom failures from inflating metrics

Per-feature failure tracking:
- New latest_test262_failures_by_feature map: records exact failing
  test IDs from each ingestion, replacing the previous count-only model
- New latest_lockstep_mismatches_by_feature map: same for lockstep
  mismatches, keyed by feature+runtime
- Enables precise waiver coverage analysis — waivers can now be
  validated against the actual set of failing tests, not just counts

Waiver-aware status management:
- Status auto-update (Passing/InProgress) now checks whether the
  feature is fully waived before overriding — previously, ingesting
  test results for a waived feature could flip its status from Waived
  to InProgress, masking the waiver
- sync_feature_wide_waived_status() called before status updates

Tests:
- Validation rejects inconsistent failing_test_ids counts
- Validation rejects duplicate test IDs
- Per-feature failure maps populated correctly after ingestion
- Waived features retain Waived status through ingestion cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
